channel.title: SSpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Key takeaways from LaGuardia plane crash report
item.description: Investigators detail issues leading to last month's fatal collision.

item.title: Judge orders release of Colorado firebomb suspect's family
item.description: Judge releases from immigration custody the family of man charged in 2025 Boulder firebomb attack.

item.title: LISTEN: Can companies really build data centers in space?
item.description: Rob DeMillo discusses orbital compute and space-based data centers.

item.title: Trump's $1M 'gold card' visa granted to only one person so far
item.description: Only one foreigner has been approved for the $1 million 'gold card' visa, says Lutnick.

item.title: Israel-Lebanon ceasefire extended three weeks, Trump says
item.description: Trump announces three-week ceasefire extension after White House meeting.
